# kSecCFErrorRequirementSyntax

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a string containing a compilation error generated when parsing a requirement.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecCFErrorRequirementSyntax: CFString
```

## Discussion

This key is present when a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecRequirementCreateWithStringAndErrors(_:_:_:_:)] function results in a compilation error during the processing of the code requirement string.
title: kSecCFErrorRequirementSyntax
